member.name: T:DomainModeling.Tests.SampleDomain.Order
member.summary: Represents a customer order in the sales domain.

member.name: T:DomainModeling.Tests.SampleDomain.Customer
member.summary: A customer who can place orders.

member.name: T:DomainModeling.Tests.SampleDomain.OrderLine
member.summary: A single line item within an order.

member.name: T:DomainModeling.Tests.SampleDomain.Money
member.summary: Represents a monetary amount with currency.

member.name: T:DomainModeling.Tests.SampleDomain.OrderPlacedEvent
member.summary: Raised when an order is placed by a customer.

member.name: T:DomainModeling.Tests.SampleDomain.OrderShippedEvent
member.summary: Raised when an order has shipped.

member.name: T:DomainModeling.Tests.SampleDomain.CustomerCreatedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a new customer registers.

member.name: T:DomainModeling.Tests.SampleDomain.OrderPlacedHandler
member.summary: Processes order-placed events for downstream fulfillment.
